subject: Social Science - Geography
overall_learning_objectives: Explain the concept of raw materials
Understand the factors affecting the location of industries
Explain the components of an industrial system
Recognize the importance of industries in economic development
Understand the environmental impact of industries

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Industries
student_activities: Discuss industries found in their local area

lesson_plan.title: Types of Industries
student_activities: Classify industries into primary, secondary, and tertiary sectors

lesson_plan.title: Raw Materials and Industrial Products
topics_covered: Conversion of raw materials into products
student_activities: Draw a simple production flow diagram

lesson_plan.title: Factors Affecting Location of Industries
teaching_strategy: Examples of industries located near resources
student_activities: Identify why industries are located in certain areas

lesson_plan.title: Industrial System
student_activities: Draw a diagram showing an industrial system
Explain inputs, processes, and outputs using an example

lesson_plan.title: Importance of Industries
student_activities: List ways industries help the economy
Discuss industries that exist in their region

lesson_plan.title: Industrial Pollution and Revision
student_activities: List types of pollution caused by industries

teacher_tip: Use real-life examples of local industries and simple production diagrams to help students clearly understand how raw materials are transformed into finished goods.
